blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,815 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
